profile.name: Samuel Kolbeck
profile.title: M.Sc. Economics Candidate
profile.summary: Driven M.Sc. Economics candidate (Univ. Wien, Nova SBE) with practical experience in M&A, Consulting, FinTech, and Business Development. Proven analytical skills in quantitative analysis, econometric modeling, market research, and due diligence.

education.details: Focus: Applied Microeconomics, Applied Macroeconomics, Econometrics, Financial History. (Current Grade: 1.2)

education.institution: Nova School of Business and Economics
education.details: Courses: Behavioral Economics, Competition Policy, Financial Statement Analysis, History of Economic Analysis, Development Economics.
Bachelor Thesis: 'Climate variability and population size: An econometric analysis'. Grade: 2.0. Focus: Development Economics, Public Finance, International Trade, Institutional Economics.
International experience in business and economics.

tasks: Strategic analysis of DACH and UK markets to identify B2B target customers for data compliance solutions.
Conducting technical discovery calls to determine customer-specific requirements in Data Compliance (GDPR) and Server-Side Tracking.
Evaluation of technical maturity for lead qualification and supporting the sales team in structuring complex SaaS deals.
Support in Technology and Operational Due Diligence through the creation of insightful analyses for customer presentations.
Assistance in creating an Investment Memorandum for a sell-side capital increase; preparation of factsheets for customer meetings.
Conducting target screenings and analyses of potential buyers (Target-Search) for buy- and sell-side M&A projects.
Involved in business valuations by compiling and analyzing balance sheets, P&L statements, and transaction comps.
Support of the PMO in a finance transformation project for a DAX-40 company, involved in project/budget planning, forecasting, and cost monitoring.
Building expertise in SAP FI/CO modules, support in documenting as-is processes and migration tests.
Collaboration in the research group 'Gen AI in Real Estate', conducting market analyses and developing use cases.

experience.company: RIDE Capital (FinTech Platform for Asset Structuring)
tasks: Controlling operational workflows for GmbHs in compliance with German tax regulations.
Optimization of internal processes to reduce processing times for customer onboarding and portfolio setup.
Close cooperation with tax advisors, tax offices, and customers; technical support for interface problems.

experience.company: RIDE Capital (FinTech Platform for Asset Structuring)
tasks: Ensuring smooth operational processes and cross-functional support in Marketing and HR.
Leading the internal Academy, a weekly internal training with a focus on Economics and Trading.

skills.econometrics: R & Stata (Regression analysis, Panel data, Time series), Python (Data automation), SQL
skills.business_tools: Excel (Financial modeling, DCF, ROIC & Profitability), PowerPoint, HubSpot, LaTeX
skills.languages: German (Native), English (Fluent - C1/C2, TOEFL 109), Spanish (Conversational - A2), French (Basic - A1/A2)
skills.interests: Mountaineering, Chess, Economic History, Skiing, Rowing, Cooking, Motorcycling
